backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend, implementing product catalog management, tarot services, user profiles, orders, wishlist, loyalty points, newsletter signup, and appointment booking with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping planned features (reviews, related products, customer gallery, crystal of the day, etc.) to their implementation files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summary index describing the purpose and key changes of each frontend source file across the project.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including sidebar, chart, and UI element variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app with SEO meta tags, viewport settings, and the root div that mounts the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections, manages state for service booking, wishlist panel, and a timed newsletter modal (shown after 15 seconds if not already subscribed).
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying Ishita's portrait, bio text, and three stat badges (experience, clients, confidentiality) styled with the blue-crystal-moon color palette.
frontend/src/components/Appointment.tsx: Multi-step appointment booking form (form → payment → confirmation) that collects user details, validates inputs, shows a UPI payment step, and submits via the useCreateAppointment mutation hook.
Displays a deterministically selected (date-based) daily crystal from the product catalog with an intention message, pricing (including Holi promo), and a scroll-to-product shop button.
frontend/src/components/CrystalQuiz.tsx: Interactive multi-step quiz (zodiac, mood, intention) that scores answers against crystal IDs and recommends matching crystals from the product catalog, with loyalty points integration and pricing display.
Renders a responsive image grid of customer unboxing photos with hover overlays and an Instagram follow CTA, falling back to an emoji placeholder on image load errors.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, Instagram link, reading services list, crystal shop categories, and a book-reading CTA button that scrolls to the appointment section or calls an optional callback.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with a centered logo (with SVG fallback), a wishlist button showing item count, and a loyalty points badge. Includes the HoliBanner component above the main header bar.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-width hero section displaying the brand logo, tagline, star rating, and CTA buttons to scroll to services or products, with animated decorative sparkle elements.
frontend/src/components/HoliBanner.tsx: Promotional banner for a Holi sale that shows the discount percentage and a live countdown timer; renders nothing when HOLI_PROMO_ACTIVE is false.
frontend/src/components/ImportantNotes.t: Static section displaying four policy/info cards (delivery time, format, restrictions, confidentiality) in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/components/LoyaltyPointsBad: Small pill-shaped badge that displays the user's current loyalty points and shows a tooltip with progress toward the next reward tier.
frontend/src/components/NewsletterSignup: Newsletter signup form (usable inline or as a modal) that collects name and email, calls the signup mutation, and displays a discount code on success.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component for a single product showing its image, type badge, Holi sale/trending badges, pricing with optional Holi discount, wishlist toggle with loyalty point awards, and expandable reviews section.
frontend/src/components/ProductCatalog.t: Renders the product catalog section with filter tabs (all, crystal, bracelet, pendulum, yantra), a Holi promotional banner, and a grid of ProductCard components filtered by the active tab.
frontend/src/components/ProductReviews.t: Displays star ratings and individual customer reviews for a specific product, showing an average rating summary and a scrollable list of review cards filtered by productId.
Shows up to three related products of the same type as the current product, with thumbnail, name, and Holi-adjusted price, scrolling to the product card on click.
frontend/src/components/Reviews.tsx: Renders a full-page testimonials section displaying all reviews from the data source in a responsive grid with star ratings, review text, author name, date, and category badge.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Displays tarot and spiritual service offerings in category cards with a hand-pentacle SVG illustration, service names, prices, and individual 'Book This' buttons that open a booking flow.
Renders a gallery grid of service category images with hover overlays and labels, falling back to an SVG illustration when images fail to load, plus an Instagram follow button.
frontend/src/components/WishlistPanel.ts: A slide-in side panel showing wishlisted products with Holi-discounted prices, remove/clear actions, a total price summary, and an order button that opens the Instagram profile.
frontend/src/data/products.ts: Defines the LocalProduct interface and exports a static array of product listings (crystals, bracelets, etc.) with metadata like price, image URL, and trending status.
frontend/src/data/reviews.ts: Defines the Review interface and exports a static array of customer reviews for tarot sessions and crystal purchases, each with rating, date, and optional product ID.
frontend/src/data/serviceGalleryImages.t: Defines the ServiceGalleryImage interface and exports a static array mapping tarot service categories to their banner image paths and display labels.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLoyaltyPoints.ts: Custom hook that manages a localStorage-backed loyalty points system with tier rewards, and exposes helpers to award points for purchases, wishlist additions, and quiz completions.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching and mutating products, tarot services, and appointments via the ICP backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useWishlist.ts: Custom hook that manages a localStorage-persisted wishlist of product IDs, exposing add, remove, toggle, and clear operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Cinzel, Cormorant Garamond, Lato), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a comprehensive set of CSS custom properties for a blue-crystal-moon brand palette in both light and dark modes, plus utility classes for gradients and borders.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/pricing.ts: Utility module providing functions to calculate final product prices (base + ₹400 markup), format prices in Indian Rupees, and compute Holi promotional discounts (20% off), with a flag to toggle the promo active state.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist parameters in sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL hash without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with brand-specific colors (crystal, moon, sparkle, navy, leaf), custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, background gradients, and keyframe animations (float, sparkle, accordion), plus typography and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file (schema v1.0.0, version 3) that records the current summary, architectural notes, known issues, image requirements for unboxing photos, and a list of existing implemented features for the crystal e-commerce site.
